title: Bootstrap repo-local OpenCode and OMO-lite supervisor foundation
summary: Install OpenCode and Oh My OpenCode locally, add repo-local config, and lock the Homecook OMO-lite supervisor contract.
goal: Make Homecook ready for Codex-supervisor-based OMO-lite rollout by bootstrapping the runtime, repo config, and supervisor spec.

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-lite-config.test.ts

open_questions: When should Homecook re-enable ralph-loop after a repo-local stage dispatcher exists?
What is the cleanest path to re-enable comment-checker once the published binary link issue is resolved?
